info.name: text-delete
info.text: We move forward by learning new routines that we can reproduce.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: To progress you have to learn to move in step with other people.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: By not moving in time with the beat you fall out of step with those you interact with.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: To move forward you need to be in time with others.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Through practice and repetition we learn to move forward as one.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Dancing is hard work and needs persistence, just like progress.
